_note: TEMPLATE example — in risk_off the book de-risks to the USDT reserve regardless of the signal. A full-reserve target portfolio is validator-clean.

computed.regime_reason: fear_greed 23 <= 30 (also breadth 31 <= 40 and median -3.6 < -2) -> risk_off; signal overridden by capital preservation

entry: No new entries in risk_off: exposure_multiplier 0.2 and no name clears score 0.65.
Capital preservation outranks the signal: the book rotates to the USDT reserve.
exit: Exit held risk names: score below min_score_to_hold 0.50 and regime is risk_off.
Rotate proceeds into USDT via TWAP; honour stop_loss 12%; stay flat until the regime upgrades.

actions.reason: regime risk_off; score 0.42 < min_score_to_hold 0.50; rotate to reserve
No asset clears min_score_to_enter 0.65 in risk_off; allocator holds full reserve (exposure_multiplier 0.2)
daily-trade requirement satisfied via minimal heartbeat trade (<= 0.10% NAV) while flat
